testcase.name: Badge Real-Time Updates - E2E › FR-001 + FR-002: Badge updates from pending → processing → completed in real-time

failure.message: badge-realtime-update.spec.ts:39:3 FR-001 + FR-002: Badge updates from pending → processing → completed in real-time

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › badge-realtime-update.spec.ts:39:3 › Badge Real-Time Updates - E2E › FR-001 + FR-002: Badge updates from pending → processing → completed in real-time
